name: Pfeffernuse
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to moderate (375°F).
2. Combine flour, sugar, cinnamon, ginger, baking powder, salt, pepper, nutmeg and cloves in a large bowl.
3. Stir in molasses and butter with a wooden spoon until well combined.
4. Mix in egg until blended; the dough will be stiff.
5. Shape into 1-inch balls using about 1-1/2 teaspoons per cookie.
6. Place cookies 1 inch apart on an ungreased baking sheet.
7. Bake in the preheated moderate oven (375°F) for 10 to 12 minutes or until a wooden pick inserted in the center of a cookie comes out clean; the cookies will crack.
8. Remove cookies and place them on a wire rack.
9. Roll in confectioners' sugar while still warm and return to the rack to cool completely.
